[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 000000100 1
2 000100100 2
3 001000001 2
4 110111101 7
5 011000100 3
6 001000000 1
7 000000000 a
